case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR VS. ERLINDA CANIZALEZ

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CANIZALEZ, ERLINDA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,173.30 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CANIZALEZ, ERLINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANIZALEZ, ERLINDA $3,173.30 PRINCIPAL, $65.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,238.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65.50) SERVED NOV-20-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CANIZALEZ, ERLINDA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DORAN GIN-SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2013 - JUDGMENT.
